researchNotes: Max: Rates sourced from official tariff PDF (taarifon_general_42025.pdf, valid from 2025-04-01) and updated November 2025 tariff. Monthly fees confirmed from the official table.

Isracard: Official tariff PDFs are bank-specific (per-bank tariff system). The non-bank (חוץ בנקאי) tariff from 2021 is the latest publicly retrievable PDF, but card-specific fee data confirmed from current product pages (Flycard, Basic, TOP, World Elite). Credit interest rates are NOT published as a fixed percentage — they appear on the monthly statement per card/arrangement.
CAL: Rates sourced from official amlot.pdf (valid from 2026-05-01) and changes page (changes/) confirming prime rate movements. CAL confirmed prime = 5.25% as of 2026-05-28.

CRITICAL NOTE on credit/installment interest rates: Israeli credit card companies do NOT publish a single fixed annual interest rate in their public tariff documents. Rates are prime-linked and vary per customer, product, and arrangement. The 14-16% range cited by multiple aggregator sources (moneyplan.co.il, 2025-2026) is a market estimate. CAL confirms minimum prime+2% for loans. Isracard states rates appear on monthly statements. Max does not publish a specific rate in its public tariff. These fields are marked needs_verification.
Foreign exchange commission: Confirmed from official PDFs — Max: 3%, CAL: 3%, Isracard non-bank standard: 2.9% (inferred from Flycard discount pages stating '2.5% instead of 2.9%').

notes.creditInterestRate: unverified — Max does not publish a fixed annual credit interest rate in its public tariff. Market sources cite ~14-16% p.a. for revolving credit as of 2025. Check individual cardholder agreement or monthly statement. Source: max.co.il tariff + moneyplan.co.il 2026
notes.installmentInterestRate: unverified — rate is prime-linked and customer-specific. Not disclosed in public tariff. Check monthly statement. Source: max.co.il
notes.cardLoanInterestRate: unverified — 'הלוואה ברגע' and similar products are prime-linked. Loan calculator page notes illustrative rates of 4%-6.5%. Actual rate per customer approval. Source: max.co.il/loans/dictionary/loan-calculator
notes.monthlyFee: 19.90 ₪ is the Platinum/Gold/International base rate (highest tier shown in tariff). Classic cards: 12.90 ₪. Full waiver possible if monthly spend thresholds met. Source: official tariff PDF April 2025

Max Classic (ויזה/מאסטרקארד קלאסיק).notes: Fee waived at ₪5,000+/month spend; reduced to ₪7.90 at ₪1,750+/month. Source: taarifon_general_42025.pdf

Max International (ויזה/מאסטרקארד בינלאו.notes: Fee waived at ₪6,000+/month; reduced to ₪12.90 at ₪3,000+/month. Source: taarifon_general_42025.pdf

Max Gold (זהב / זהב עסקי).notes: Fee waived at ₪5,000+/month; reduced to ₪15.90 at ₪3,000+/month. Source: taarifon_general_42025.pdf

Max Platinum (פלטינה).notes: Fee waived at ₪6,000+/month; reduced to ₪15.90 at ₪3,000+/month. Foreign currency charges deferred to billing date without interest for Platinum Mastercard holders. Source: taarifon_general_42025.pdf

Max Free (max free).notes: No monthly fee. Additional ₪3 for non-internet correspondence. Source: taarifon_general_42025.pdf

Max Cash / Max Pre-Paid.notes: No spend-based waiver or discount available. Source: taarifon_general_42025.pdf

Isracard._warningOnTariff: Isracard publishes bank-specific tariff PDFs (per issuing bank). The non-bank (חוץ בנקאי) tariff accessible publicly dates from 2021. Current card product pages and club pages are used to supplement. Interest rates are NOT disclosed in the tariff — they appear per customer on monthly statements.

notes.creditInterestRate: unverified — Isracard does not publish a fixed annual credit interest rate publicly. Market sources cite 14-16% p.a. as of 2025. Isracard states rates appear on monthly statements. Source: isracard.co.il credit products page + moneyplan.co.il 2026
notes.installmentInterestRate: unverified — rates are prime-linked and customer/product-specific. 'חישוב עסקת קרדיט' calculator available on site. Loan minimum is prime+1% per HOT club page. Source: isracard.co.il
notes.cardLoanInterestRate: unverified — minimum prime+1% (confirmed on HOT club product page). Actual rate per customer. Source: isracard.co.il/credit-cards/moadonhot
notes.foreignExchangeCommission: 2.9% inferred from Flycard product pages stating discount to '2.5% instead of 2.9% per tariff' and '1.8% instead of 2.9%'. This is the Isracard non-bank standard FX rate. Source: isracard.co.il/flycard/private
notes.monthlyFee: unverified — Isracard non-bank fees vary by card type. Standard club cards may be free (HOT: 0 ₪, BASIC: see below). Bank-issued cards follow respective bank tariffs. No single default figure available without fetching specific PDFs. Manual check required.

Isracard BASIC.notes: 0% FX commission on purchases abroad and international online (not cash withdrawals). Monthly fee: unverified — check isracard.co.il/credit-cards/basic tariff. Source: isracard.co.il/credit-cards/basic

Isracard TOP.notes: 15% discount on FX commission (2.9% × 0.85 = ~2.465%). Free for first 12 billing cycles. After that, fees per tariff and spend target. Source: isracard.co.il/credit-cards/isracardtop

Isracard HOT Club (מועדון הוט).notes: 0 ₪ monthly fee as long as card is club-associated. FX commission: 1.5% on purchases (50% discount from 2.9% tariff). Cash withdrawal abroad: 3.5% (no discount). Source: isracard.co.il/credit-cards/moadonhot

Isracard CashBack+ (ישראכרט +Cashback).notes: 0% FX commission available for 2 months per year upon activating benefit code in advance. At other times standard 2.9% applies. Monthly fee: unverified. Source: mako.co.il article Aug 2025 citing Isracard benefit

Flycard (ישראכרט).notes: FX commission 2.5% (instead of 2.9% per tariff). Premium Flycard: 1.8%. Source: isracard.co.il/flycard/private — valid as of Feb 2026

Flycard Premium (ישראכרט).notes: FX commission 1.8%. Monthly fee ₪20.90 for new joiners until 31.10.2026 (promotional). Standard rate after promo period: check tariff. Source: isracard.co.il/flycard/private

World Elite Mastercard (ישראכרט).notes: Monthly fee denominated in USD: $63.90/month. Requires financial assets >₪1M. FX commission: unverified — likely 0% or heavily discounted. Source: isracard.co.il/credit-cards/world_elite_mastercard

notes.creditInterestRate: unverified — CAL does not publish a fixed credit interest rate in its public tariff. Market sources cite 14-16% p.a. revolving credit as of 2025. CAL homepage states minimum prime+2% for loans (prime = 5.25% as of 2026-05-28, so minimum ~7.25%). Actual rate customer-specific. Source: cal-online.co.il homepage + changes page
notes.installmentInterestRate: unverified — rate set at time of installment arrangement, prime-linked. Displayed on monthly statement. Source: cal-online.co.il/ecredit/debit-spread/
notes.cardLoanInterestRate: unverified — minimum prime+2% per homepage. Actual rate per approval. Prime = 5.25% as of 2026-05-28. Source: cal-online.co.il
notes.foreignExchangeCommission: 3.0% confirmed in official amlot.pdf (valid 2026-05-01): 'עמלת עסקאות במט"ח 3.0% מסכום העסקה'. Source: cal-online.co.il/media/ma5oflaj/amlot.pdf
notes.monthlyFee: ₪17.90 confirmed for standard cards (local/international/business/gold AND platinum) effective 2025-03-02 per CAL changes page. Previous: standard ₪15.90, platinum ₪19.90. Source: cal-online.co.il/about/legal-reports/changes/ + amlot.pdf

CAL Standard (מקומי / בינלאומי / זהב / ע.notes: ₪17.90 base; ₪9.90 at ₪5,000+/month; free at ₪7,500+/month. Source: amlot.pdf valid 2026-05-01

CAL Platinum (פלטינום).notes: ₪17.90 base (reduced from ₪19.90 as of 2025-03-02); ₪15.90 at ₪7,500+/month; free at ₪12,000+/month. Source: amlot.pdf valid 2026-05-01 + changes page

CAL Lite (Cal לייט).notes: ₪5.90/month, no spend-based waiver noted in tariff. Source: amlot.pdf valid 2026-05-01

CAL Aviation Club Bronze / Platinum (מוע.notes: ₪19.90/month. No spend-based waiver. FX per standard tariff 3%. Source: amlot.pdf valid 2026-05-01

CashCal Pro.notes: ₪19.90/month. FX 1% in year 1 only (then rises to 2%), per mako.co.il Aug 2025 market article. Source: mako.co.il/finances-money article Aug 2025 — needs official verification

CAL Flycard Mastercard.notes: FX 2.5% (instead of 3% per CAL tariff). Source: cal-online.co.il/cards/flycard/

CAL Premium Flycard Mastercard.notes: FX 1.8% (instead of 3% per CAL tariff). Source: cal-online.co.il/cards/flycard/

Diners Club Israel (דיינרס).notes: Diners cards share same tariff table as CAL Visa/Mastercard. Standard ₪17.90 or Platinum ₪17.90. Diners Extra / Secret Flights: free if ₪5,000+/month spend. Source: amlot.pdf valid 2026-05-01

primeRate.notes: Prime rate changes confirmed from CAL official changes page. Affects all prime-linked credit products (30+, Adif, Tashlum Adif, revolving credit, CalChoice). Credit interest rates for קרדיט and Larg products only change for new transactions post-change date.

Isracard: specific club fees (BASIC, TOP, HOT, Flycard, World Elite)

unverifiedFields: creditInterestRate — ALL issuers: not published in public tariffs; customer-specific, prime-linked
installmentInterestRate — ALL issuers: not published; set at time of arrangement
cardLoanInterestRate — ALL issuers: not published as fixed rate; CAL minimum prime+2% confirmed
Isracard base monthlyFee — bank-specific tariffs not fetched
CashCal Pro FX rate — sourced from third-party article, not official CAL page
Isracard World Elite FX commission — not found on official page
_summary.keyInsight: Israeli credit card companies do not publish fixed annual interest rates in their public tariffs. All credit/installment/loan rates are prime-linked and customer-specific, disclosed on monthly statements. Only FX commissions and monthly card fees appear as fixed published figures.
